scope: Observable conversational function of a SpeechPassage; excludes emotion, character identity, relationship, scene meaning, genre, irony, comedy, and narrative purpose.
language_scope: English calibration only until reviewed multilingual evidence exists.

labels.name: declarative
labels.definition: A proposition or statement presented as information.
inclusion_rules: Grammatically or pragmatically statement-like.
exclusion_rules: Do not infer truth or narrative importance.

labels.name: interrogative
labels.definition: An utterance formed as a question.
inclusion_rules: Question punctuation or clear interrogative construction.
exclusion_rules: Rhetorical intent is not inferred.
counterexamples: Tell me where you are going.

labels.name: imperative
labels.definition: An utterance grammatically directing an action.
inclusion_rules: Bare-verb directive or explicit instruction.
exclusion_rules: Politeness does not remove imperative form.

labels.name: exclamatory
labels.definition: A lexical utterance marked as an exclamation or emphatic reaction.
inclusion_rules: Lexical content with explicit exclamatory form.
exclusion_rules: Do not label non-lexical vocalizations here.

labels.name: fragment
labels.definition: A lexical but syntactically incomplete passage.
inclusion_rules: Incomplete phrase still carrying lexical content.
exclusion_rules: Do not treat ASR truncation as deliberate without evidence.

labels.name: non_lexical
labels.definition: A vocalization without stable lexical propositional content.
inclusion_rules: Laughter, sighs, grunts, or isolated vocal particles.
exclusion_rules: Short lexical acknowledgments remain lexical.

labels.name: unknown
labels.definition: Surface form cannot be determined from available evidence.
inclusion_rules: Empty, corrupt, or irreducibly noisy transcript.
exclusion_rules: Do not use merely because an utterance is short.

labels.name: provide_information
labels.definition: Supplies factual or asserted information.
inclusion_rules: Observable informational statement.
exclusion_rules: No truth or relevance judgment.

labels.name: request_information
labels.definition: Seeks information from another participant.
inclusion_rules: Direct or conventional information question.
exclusion_rules: Exclude action requests phrased as questions.

labels.name: request_action
labels.definition: Asks another participant to perform an action.
inclusion_rules: Polite or indirect action request.
exclusion_rules: Separate forceful commands when clear.

labels.name: acknowledgment
labels.definition: Signals receipt or recognition without necessarily agreeing.
inclusion_rules: Okay, understood, I see.
exclusion_rules: Do not equate receipt with agreement.

labels.name: agreement
labels.definition: Expresses alignment with a proposition or proposal.
inclusion_rules: Explicit assent or concurrence.
exclusion_rules: Exclude neutral acknowledgment.

labels.name: disagreement
labels.definition: Rejects or contests a proposition.
inclusion_rules: Explicit contradiction or dissent.
exclusion_rules: Action refusal may co-occur but is distinct.

labels.name: refusal
labels.definition: Declines a request, offer, or proposed action.
inclusion_rules: Explicit unwillingness or rejection of action.
exclusion_rules: Do not infer an unstated prior request.

labels.name: command
labels.definition: Directs another participant to act with directive force.
inclusion_rules: Unmitigated directive.
exclusion_rules: Polite requests default to request_action.

labels.name: warning
labels.definition: Alerts another participant to danger or harmful consequence.
inclusion_rules: Explicit danger, caution, or impending harm.
exclusion_rules: Do not infer danger from dramatic context alone.

labels.name: accusation
labels.definition: Attributes wrongdoing or blame to another participant.
inclusion_rules: Explicit attribution of fault.
exclusion_rules: Negative evaluation without blamed agency is insufficient.

labels.name: defense
labels.definition: Denies blame or justifies oneself or another against an accusation.
inclusion_rules: Explicit denial or defensive justification.
exclusion_rules: General explanation without defensive context.

labels.name: explanation
labels.definition: Provides a reason, cause, or clarifying account.
inclusion_rules: Causal or justificatory construction.
exclusion_rules: Mere information without explanatory relation.
positive_examples: I left because it was late.

labels.name: reassurance
labels.definition: Attempts to reduce concern by asserting safety or adequacy.
inclusion_rules: Explicit don't worry or it will be okay form.
exclusion_rules: Emotion itself is not classified.

labels.name: confession
labels.definition: Admits one's own concealed or blameworthy act or fact.
inclusion_rules: Explicit self-attributed admission.
exclusion_rules: Ordinary self-report is not confession.

labels.name: threat
labels.definition: Communicates intended harm or adverse consequence contingent on another.
inclusion_rules: Explicit prospective harm or coercive consequence.
exclusion_rules: Warnings about independent danger are not threats.
positive_examples: Do that and I'll hurt you.

labels.name: revelation
labels.definition: Presents information explicitly framed as newly disclosed or previously hidden.
inclusion_rules: The truth is, it was me; it turns out.
exclusion_rules: Novelty must be linguistically or contextually supported.
positive_examples: The truth is, I knew all along.

labels.name: interruption
labels.definition: Attempts to halt, seize, or redirect the current conversational floor.
inclusion_rules: Wait, hold on, let me finish.
exclusion_rules: Requires bounded conversational context unless lexically explicit.

labels.name: deflection
labels.definition: Avoids the current issue by dismissing or redirecting it.
inclusion_rules: Never mind, anyway, let's not discuss that.
exclusion_rules: Ordinary topic transition is insufficient.

labels.name: narration
labels.definition: Recounts events as a temporally organized account.
inclusion_rules: Then, afterward, once upon a time, or sustained event recounting.
exclusion_rules: Single factual statement is not necessarily narration.
positive_examples: Then we crossed the river and returned home.

labels.name: greeting_or_address
labels.definition: Opens contact, says farewell, or explicitly calls for attention by address.
inclusion_rules: Hello, goodbye, hey plus addressee.
exclusion_rules: A name inside a proposition is insufficient.

labels.name: clarification_or_repair
labels.definition: Corrects, repeats, or requests clarification of prior discourse.
inclusion_rules: I mean, rather, what do you mean, pardon?
exclusion_rules: General explanation without repair relation.

labels.name: discourse_management
labels.definition: Manages speaking order, topic, or conversational procedure.
inclusion_rules: Let me finish, moving on, first of all.
exclusion_rules: Do not infer from editing or shot order.
positive_examples: Let's return to the first point.

labels.name: evaluation_or_reaction
labels.definition: Expresses an observable assessment or lexical reaction.
inclusion_rules: That's good, terrible, amazing; lexical reaction.
exclusion_rules: Do not infer internal emotion.

labels.name: unknown
labels.definition: Function cannot be determined from available evidence.
inclusion_rules: Insufficient, corrupt, or context-dependent evidence.
exclusion_rules: Use a supported label when evidence is adequate.

labels.name: ambiguous
labels.definition: Two or more materially different functions remain comparably supported.
inclusion_rules: Record competing labels and preserve ambiguity.
exclusion_rules: Ordinary multi-function utterances are not automatically ambiguous.

labels.name: not_applicable
labels.definition: Interaction function does not apply to the available non-lexical evidence.
inclusion_rules: Pure non-lexical vocalization without supported interaction role.
exclusion_rules: Do not use for lexical interjections or unavailable transcripts.

labels.name: initiating
labels.definition: Begins a supported conversational sequence.
inclusion_rules: Valid ordered structure places it at sequence start.
exclusion_rules: Do not infer from semantics alone.
positive_examples: First ordered turn asking a question.

labels.name: responding
labels.definition: Directly responds to a preceding supported passage or turn.
inclusion_rules: Valid order plus response evidence.
exclusion_rules: Adjacency alone is insufficient when relation is unclear.

labels.name: continuing
labels.definition: Continues an already established contribution or sequence.
inclusion_rules: Ordered evidence supports continuation rather than response.
exclusion_rules: Do not infer from conjunction alone.
positive_examples: Second ordered passage of one account.

labels.name: closing
labels.definition: Closes a supported exchange or sequence.
inclusion_rules: Ordered structure and closing form agree.
exclusion_rules: Do not infer from final timeline position alone.
positive_examples: Goodbye at the end of an ordered exchange.

labels.name: standalone
labels.definition: A structurally supported passage outside an exchange sequence.
inclusion_rules: Structure explicitly establishes isolation.
exclusion_rules: Missing structure means unavailable, not standalone.
counterexamples: An unlinked passage in an incomplete artifact.

labels.name: unavailable
labels.definition: Ordered evidence is absent or insufficient.
inclusion_rules: No valid DialogueTurn or ordered passage context.
exclusion_rules: Never fabricate position from vector similarity.
positive_examples: Passage from a FilmModel with no ordered turns.
counterexamples: Passage in a validated ordered exchange.

allowed_multi_label_combinations.policy: Unlisted combinations require explicit reviewed evidence; unknown, ambiguous, and not_applicable are state labels and cannot co-occur with asserted functional labels.

ambiguity_rules: Use ambiguous only when distinct functions remain comparably supported after permitted context is considered.
Preserve candidate label confidences alongside ambiguous.
Do not collapse an allowed multi-function utterance into ambiguous.
abstention_rules: Abstain when no non-state interaction label reaches the calibrated threshold.
Abstain on empty, inaudible, or irreducibly noisy lexical evidence.
Use sequence_position.unavailable whenever valid ordered structure is absent.
Low confidence must yield neutral scheduling influence.
annotation_guidance: Annotate only functions observable from the supplied transcript and declared bounded context.
Record all genuinely co-present allowed functions.
Distinguish acknowledgment from agreement and warning from threat.
Mark transcript/audio disagreement in provenance rather than correcting ground truth silently.
Never infer emotion, character, relationship, scene meaning, irony, comedy, or narrative purpose.

migration_policy.rule: Any label addition, removal, merge, definition change, or combination-policy change requires a new taxonomy version and invalidates dependent classifications.
migration_policy.mapping_requirement: A migration artifact must map every retired label to replacement, split, or explicit no-equivalent state.
migration_policy.backward_compatibility: Older artifacts remain readable but cannot be mixed in one compatibility calculation.
